text:
Once upon a time, there was a small village nestled beside a quiet brook. Every day, the villagers would wade through the water listening to the birds.

One day, a wise old Owl moved into a tiny cottage nearby.

The Owl was famous for their wisdom. They could teach the children stories from far away lands.

"You listen here," the Owl would say. "Once upon a time..."

One little duck loved those stories. Its feathers glowed like jewels.

"A thousand times!

A thousand times!

A thousand times!

Oo-oos!

A thousand lives!

Don't drown those!

A thousand dreams!

A million?

Oh!

A thousand!

A million!

Oo-oos!

A thousand hearts!

You know those!

A thousand!

A million!

Oo!

A thousand!

A million loves you!

A thousand!

A million!

Oo.

The little duck listened eagerly. And nights?

A thousand stars!

A million?

A thousand?

A million!

Oo.
